- Test Target Start Date (YYYY-MM-DD format):
- Test Target End Date (YYYY-MM-DD format):
- Finding Title:
- Finding Description:
- Finding Severity: One of the following - Info, Low, Medium, High, Critical
- Finding Date (YYYY-MM-DD format):
- Finding Found By (optional): List of names who found this vulnerability.
- Finding Active (default: true): Should we mark it as active?
- Finding Verified (default: false): Has this finding been verified?

If any of these fields are missing or you need help, just let me know!
